1749680.name: UNPLUGGED - artbook Volume I
1749680.description:
ARTBOOK VOLUME I





As the title suggests, his DLC has been provided for those who are interested in the art style of the original game UNPLUGGED. and It's gonna get updated frequently as the game continues to grow and evolve. here is some context that would be included in this DLC:

  • character concepts
  • poster
  • illustrations
  • concept arts
  • rough animations


The Artbook is downloaded to the folder where the game is installed, which can be accessed in the Steam directory via :
...\Steam\SteamApps\common\UNPLUGGED\artbook
or you can find it on the steam client through:
right-click on the UNPLUGGED game -> Manage -> Browse local files.

hope you enjoy it.
cheers.
